fact_00000.text: The Eiffel Tower is located in Paris, France.
fact_00000.negation: the eiffel tower is not located in paris, france.

fact_00001.text: Python was first released in 1991 by Guido van Rossum.
fact_00001.negation: python was not first released in 1991 by guido van rossum.

fact_00002.text: The speed of light in a vacuum is 299,792 km/s.
fact_00002.negation: the speed of light in a vacuum is not 299,792 km/s.

fact_00003.text: Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at sea level.

fact_00004.text: The Great Wall of China is located in China.
fact_00004.negation: the great wall of china is not located in china.

fact_00005.text: Shakespeare wrote Hamlet, Macbeth, and Othello.
fact_00005.negation: shakespeare not wrote hamlet, macbeth, and othello.
